# Vedang Barhate — Portfolio

This site contains projects and technical writing about systems programming (Linux/eBPF) and backend engineering.

## Key pages
- Home: /
- Projects: /projects/
- Blog: /blog/
- About: /about/
- RSS: /rss.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap-index.xml

## Notes for automated readers
- Pages are static HTML with internal links and an RSS feed for updates.
- Canonical URLs are set via `PUBLIC_SITE_URL` during builds.
